sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67782" key="mikrotra/xhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρο-τράχηλος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n67782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with small cervix</tr_>, of the womb, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.56</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
